TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_kayal(Ś§©Á©ļ;Ś§©śį£), title = kayal(Ś§©Á©ļ;Ś§©śį£), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/kayal(Ś§©Á©ļ;Ś§©śį£)} }

S.FORM: kayal qani hya' ga, pzyux qu kkyalan niya' ini' ptnaq, maki' qu blaq kayal , ri yaqih kayal . blaq kayal hya ga, nanu' yaqu smbu' wagi' , ru mswat , nanak qani qu sawn 'tayal maha blaq kayal hya'. yaqih kayal hya' lga, yaqu psbayhuy , ru mqwalax , ru mczngsuy ,qani qu sawn 'tayal naha yaqih kayal. nanu' qu kkayal na maha yaqih kayal qani hya' ga, mzyay' su' maha, tmrang musa' sami rgyax sa kawas wayal ga, minlu' shngan sami na mhlaqiy , ru shtuy sami niya' kya rgyax, ungat qbaqan myan lru si myan niqiy kya qu tniriq myan qsinuw la, kmzima' balay lga, msqsya' qu hlaqiy niya' lru mwah sami la. ulung kya cikay na' qu ini' myan thkiy na qsinuw, mwah sami ru tayhuk sami b'bu' rgyax ttnga' ngasal lga, mqwalax la, maymaw maras qayrang qwalax nya' qasa, ana yan nasa ga, si sami qhqihul mwah, nanu' mawzyay sami balay qhzyaqan balay la. tayhuk sami ngasal lga mswat la. ana si kswat lga rima' mlhngan lkiy.

kayal qani hya' ga, pzyux qu kkyalan niya' ini' ptnaq, maki' qu blaq kayal , ri yaqih kayal . blaq kayal hya ga, nanu' yaqu smbu' wagi' , ru mswat , nanak qani qu sawn 'tayal maha blaq kayal hya'. yaqih kayal hya' lga, yaqu psbayhuy , ru mqwalax , ru mczngsuy ,qani qu sawn 'tayal naha yaqih kayal. nanu' qu kkayal na maha yaqih kayal qani hya' ga, mzyay' su' maha, tmrang musa' sami rgyax sa kawas wayal ga, minlu' shngan sami na mhlaqiy , ru shtuy sami niya' kya rgyax, ungat qbaqan myan lru si myan niqiy kya qu tniriq myan qsinuw la, kmzima' balay lga, msqsya' qu hlaqiy niya' lru mwah sami la. ulung kya cikay na' qu ini' myan thkiy na qsinuw, mwah sami ru tayhuk sami b'bu' rgyax ttnga' ngasal lga, mqwalax la, maymaw maras qayrang qwalax nya' qasa, ana yan nasa ga, si sami qhqihul mwah, nanu' mawzyay sami balay qhzyaqan balay la. tayhuk sami ngasal lga mswat la. ana si kswat lga rima' mlhngan lkiy.
S.PHON: kajal qani ńßja Ē …£a, pzjux qu kkjalan nija Ē ini Ē ptnaq, maki Ē qu ő≤laq kajal , ri jaqińß kajal . ő≤laq kajal ńßja …£a, nanu Ē jaqu s~…ēmő≤u Ē wa…£i Ē , ru ms~…ēwat , nanak qani qu s~…ēawn Ētajal mańßa ő≤laq kajal ńßja Ē. jaqińß kajal ńßja Ē l…£a, jaqu ps~…ēő≤ajńßuj , ru mqwalax , ru m ¶~ ®zŇčs~…ēuj ,qani qu s~…ēawn Ētajal nańßa jaqińß kajal. nanu Ē qu kkajal na mańßa jaqińß kajal qani ńßja Ē …£a, mzjaj Ē s~…ēu Ē mańßa, tmraŇč mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēami r…£jax s~…ēa kawas~…ē wajal …£a, minlu Ē s~…ēńßŇčan s~…ēami na mńßlaqij , ru s~…ēńßtuj s~…ēami nija Ē kja r…£jax, uŇčat qő≤aqan mjan lru s~…ēi mjan niqij kja qu tniriq mjan qs~…ēinuw la, kmzima Ē ő≤alaj l…£a, ms~…ēqs~…ēja Ē qu ńßlaqij nija Ē lru mwańß s~…ēami la. uluŇč kja ¶~ ®ikaj na Ē qu ini Ē mjan tńßkij na qs~…ēinuw, mwańß s~…ēami ru tajńßuk s~…ēami ő≤ Ēő≤u Ē r…£jax ttŇča Ē Ňčas~…ēal l…£a, mqwalax la, majmaw maras~…ē qajraŇč qwalax nja Ē qas~…ēa, ana jan nas~…ēa …£a, s~…ēi s~…ēami qńßqińßul mwańß, nanu Ē mawzjaj s~…ēami ő≤alaj qńßzjaqan ő≤alaj la. tajńßuk s~…ēami Ňčas~…ēal l…£a ms~…ēwat la. ana s~…ēi ks~…ēwat l…£a rima Ē mlńßŇčan lkij.
